LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGEMENT MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES APPEARED. A R G U E D AND AS TO DEFENDANT HORAN -- MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED -- NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT EXISTS AS TO HIS COVERAGE. THE CROSS-COMPLAINT DOES NOT ALLEGE THAT HE WAS ACTING AS A MANAGING AGENT, OFFICER OR DIRECTOR DURING THE POLICY PERIOD. AS TO DEFENANT CREST ENERGY, INC. -- THE MOTION IS DENIED. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER LEE BATARA, CSR #3759 (GPS)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-21-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Sean K. Hungerford, Esq. of BULLIVANT HOUSER BAILEY PC 916/852-9100 for defendant ST. PAUL SURPLUS LINES INSURANCE COMPANY for summary judgment
Steven B. Eggleston, Esq. of LOPEZ, HODES, RESTAINO 956-5257 for Plaintiffs EDWIN P. HORAN dba Fild Study Associates and CREST ENERGY, INC. opposing party
A R G U E D and as to defendant HORAN -- motion for summary judgment granted -- no triable issue of fact exists as to his coverage. The Cross-Complaint does not allege that he was acting as a managing agent, officer or director during the policy period. As to defenant CREST ENERGY, INC. -- the motion is DENIED. (jjm/kh) LEE BATARA, CSR 3759

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-30-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Steven B. Eggleston, Esq., (415-956-5257) appeared for plaintiff Edwin P. Horann. Lenell Topol McCallum, Esq. (650-967-7854) appeared for defendant Federal Insurance Company. Mitchell S. Griffen, Esq. (415-438-4600)was present for General Security Indemnity Company.

After argument defendant Federal Insurance Company's motion for summary judgment was denied based upon Insurance Code 300 et seq. and a triable issue of fact exists with respect of coverage issues. (JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2001 Set For Trial On May-06-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Apr-18-02 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 606
